day3_night_start_2.name: Me
day3_night_start_2.text: *I took a shower and came out. My phone screen is lit up. Notifications.*

day3_night_sea_msg.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg.text: *Sea: '{name}, today was fun! Let's go together tomorrow too♥' — 10:02 PM*

day3_night_sea_msg_2.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_2.text: *I didn't read it. I put the phone down while brushing my teeth.*

day3_night_sea_msg_3.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_3.text: *1 minute later. Buzz. Sea: 'Reply before you go to sleep' — 10:03 PM*

day3_night_sea_msg_5.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_5.text: *...Three dots. What is she trying to say? This bothers me more.*

day3_night_sea_msg_9.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_9.text: *...6 messages in 13 minutes. Messages piling up without being read. The ellipsis after that last question mark... feels less like checking and more like surveillance.*

day3_night_sea_msg_10.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_10.text: *I flipped the phone face down. It still buzzes.*

day3_night_sea_msg_11.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_11.text: *Buzz. Again. I told myself I wouldn't check the screen, but my hand reaches for it.*

day3_night_sea_msg_12.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_12.text: *Sea: 'You left the window open, right? Air it out before bed' — 10:19 PM*

day3_night_sea_msg_13.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_13.text: *...The window? It is open right now. How does she know that from there?*

day3_night_sea_msg_14.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_14.text: *I look at the window. The curtain is open. It's dark outside. I can't see anything.*

day3_night_sea_msg_15.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_15.text: *...I can't see anything out there, so why does it feel like someone can see me?*

day3_night_sea_msg_16.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_16.text: *I closed the curtain. Put the phone in the drawer. Closed the drawer.*

day3_night_sea_msg_17.name: Me
day3_night_sea_msg_17.text: *...It buzzes again from inside the drawer.*

day3_night_bleed.name: Me
day3_night_bleed.text: *Lying under the covers, thinking. The lights are off. Streetlight casts a rectangular glow on the ceiling.*

day3_night_bleed_2.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_2.text: *The photos Yuna showed me. 13 identical faces, different names. They're all supposed to be me?*

day3_night_bleed_3.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_3.text: *...No. Maybe not. They could be people who look alike. Yuna could be mistaken.*

day3_night_bleed_4.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_4.text: *That's what I try to tell myself. I close my eyes. But when I close them, I see the photos. 13 ID photos in a row. Different hair colors. Different name tags. Same eyes.*

day3_night_bleed_5.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_5.text: *But. If I piece things together one by one...*

day3_night_bleed_6.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_6.text: *Why did I know the school layout from day one? Why did my body find the vending machine before I did?*

day3_night_bleed_7.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_7.text: *...It was definitely strange then. It was my first day, yet I never got lost in the hallways. My body already knew which way the faculty office was.*

day3_night_bleed_8.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_8.text: *Why does the handwriting on the locker match mine?*

day3_night_bleed_9.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_9.text: *Why does Seolhwa know that I'm left-handed?*

day3_night_bleed_10.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_10.text: *Why has Sea's lunchbox been perfectly tailored to my taste from the start?*

day3_night_bleed_11.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_11.text: *...Why are my memories of my "old school" so hazy? I can't remember what the classroom looked like, what the school gate looked like... I attended for two years, yet...*

day3_night_bleed_12.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_12.text: *I try to recall it. My old school's classroom. ...Nothing comes up. White walls. That's it. The teachers' faces? Gone. Who sat next to me? Gone. Two years' worth of memories, all of it blurred.*

day3_night_bleed_13.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_13.text: *My breathing quickens. The ceiling feels like it's pressing down on me.*

day3_night_bleed_15.name: Me
day3_night_bleed_15.text: *I sat up. Sweat beads on my forehead. My hands are shaking. ...What is this? What have I learned? No — what have I been not knowing?*

day3_night_stat_crack.name: Me
day3_night_stat_crack.text: *I lay back down. Closed my eyes.*

day3_night_stat_crack_2.name: Me
day3_night_stat_crack_2.text: *The warmth Sea showed me. Mr. Eunsu's kindness. Riin's smile.*

day3_night_stat_crack_3.name: Me
day3_night_stat_crack_3.text: *...They're all good people. They're all nice to me. And yet. Why am I so anxious? Why am I scared?*

day3_night_stat_crack_4.name: Me
day3_night_stat_crack_4.text: *I'm surrounded by good people, so why does it feel like walls on all sides?*

day3_night_stat_crack_5.name: Me
day3_night_stat_crack_5.text: *...Just now, I think I saw something. On the screen.*

day3_night_stat_crack_6.name: Me
day3_night_stat_crack_6.text: *No. Nothing's there. My eyes are just tired.*

day3_night_wall.name: Me
day3_night_wall.text: *I can't fall asleep. After tossing and turning for a long time, I finally drifted off.*

day3_night_wall_2.name: Me
day3_night_wall_2.text: *3 AM. I got up to use the bathroom. My head feels heavy.*

day3_night_wall_3.name: Me
day3_night_wall_3.text: *I walk down the hallway without turning on the light. The floor is cold under my feet. ...I stopped.*

day3_night_wall_4.name: Me
day3_night_wall_4.text: *Something is written on the wall. Faintly visible in the streetlight. In pencil. In my handwriting.*

day3_night_wall_6.name: Me
day3_night_wall_6.text: *I stopped breathing. I turned on the light. The fluorescent flickers on. The writing becomes clearly visible.*

day3_night_wall_7.name: Me
day3_night_wall_7.text: *...Did I write this? In my sleep? I have no memory of it. I definitely fell asleep and then woke up.*

day3_night_wall_8.name: Me
day3_night_wall_8.text: *I touched the writing with my hand. Pencil graphite smudges onto my fingertips. This was written recently. It's not a dried mark.*

day3_night_wall_9.name: Me
day3_night_wall_9.text: *I looked at my hands. Right index finger. Clean. ...Left hand. Pencil marks on my left index and middle finger. The first joint of my index finger is blackened.*

day3_night_wall_10.name: Me
day3_night_wall_10.text: *I'm left-handed. In my sleep, I wrote on the wall with my left hand.*

day3_night_wall_11.name: Me
day3_night_wall_11.text: *I looked around the room. A pencil is sitting on the desk. I didn't put it there. I had put it in the drawer. ...Someone — no, I — while asleep, opened the drawer, took out the pencil, wrote on the wall, placed the pencil on the desk, and lay back down.*

day3_night_wall_12.name: Me
day3_night_wall_12.text: *I have no memory of it. None at all. ...Someone who isn't me — with my own hands — while I slept — my thoughts won't organize. I'm just scared.*

day3_night_seolhwa.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa.text: *I'm staring at the writing on the wall. The air changes. The temperature seems to drop. The fluorescent light flickers once.*

day3_night_seolhwa_2.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_2.text: *Someone is standing in the corner of the room.*

day3_night_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_3.text: *My heart feels like it stopped. My body freezes.*

day3_night_seolhwa_4.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_4.text: *...It's Seolhwa. Pale face. Silver-white hair. Wet eyes. The figure of a frail girl. Wearing the school uniform. In the middle of the night. In my room. ...Is this a hallucination? Is it real? The door is locked, so how did she get in?*

day3_night_seolhwa_7.name: Seolhwa
day3_night_seolhwa_7.text: "Within five days... you have to get out of here."

day3_night_seolhwa_10.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_10.text: *Seolhwa reaches out her hand. Toward my face. Just before it touches — she stops.*

day3_night_seolhwa_11.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_11.text: *...Her hand is translucent. The streetlight from beyond the window passes through the back of her hand. Where veins should be, light passes through. Seolhwa's outline is wavering. Like a reflection on the surface of water. As if she has no substance.*

day3_night_seolhwa_13.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_13.text: *I blinked. Seolhwa is gone. Nothing where she stood. No footprints on the floor.*

day3_night_seolhwa_14.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_14.text: *...Was it a dream? But I was standing up. I was definitely standing. I heard her voice.*

day3_night_seolhwa_15.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_15.text: *I went to where she had been standing. Touched the floor. It's cold. Definitely colder than the surrounding area. ...That's all.*

day3_night_seolhwa_16.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_16.text: *The writing on the wall is still there. 'Get out of here.' In my handwriting. I look at my left hand. The left hand with pencil marks. What Seolhwa said last. "The left hand." ...What does that mean?*

day3_night_seolhwa_17.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_17.text: *The room is too quiet. Only the clock ticking. Tick. Tick. Tick.*

day3_night_seolhwa_18.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_18.text: *...Something is crumbling. Inside me. The things I'd thought were 'normal' until now, one by one.*

day3_night_investigate.name: Me
day3_night_investigate.text: *I can't close my eyes anymore. Tomorrow, somehow. Everything I saw today -- it's all connected. This isn't coincidence.*

day3_night_investigate_2.name: Me
day3_night_investigate_2.text: *I took a photo of the writing on the wall. Evidence. Evidence I left for myself.*

day3_night_deny.name: Me
day3_night_deny.text: *...It's probably just stress. I'm just on edge because of the transfer. It'll be fine tomorrow.*

day3_night_deny_2.name: Me
day3_night_deny_2.text: *I pulled the covers over myself. Closed my eyes. The writing on the wall lingers behind my eyelids.*
